message:
fix(engine): saturate LLR accumulation, enrich convergence certificates, and update fixture ID derivation

- bayesian_posterior: use saturating_add for cumulative LLR to prevent
  i64 overflow when processing extreme evidence sequences; add test
  confirming saturation at i64::MAX
- spectral_fleet_convergence: include lambda_max, fiedler iterations,
  and fiedler residual in convergence certificate hash for stronger
  uniqueness guarantees
- fleet_convergence: rustfmt formatting cleanup for assert! calls
- regret_bounded_router: rustfmt formatting for conditional expressions
- test_taxonomy: migrate FixtureEntry::derive_id to use derive_id()
  with SchemaId and EvidenceRecord domain (matching updated engine
  object ID API); update test from as_hex() to to_hex()

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
